experiment_card.research_question: Can the model emit reviewable line-range locator candidates directly, while local review/tooling computes character offsets and quote hashes only after line-range validation?
experiment_card.hypothesis: On the same selected second-source excerpt and text_judgment_v0 benchmark as pilots 004 and 005, a narrower line-range-first output contract may produce reviewable locator candidates without asking the model for unreliable character offsets or hashes.
experiment_card.evaluation_plan: Validate this proposed ExperimentCard and MethodCard against protocol schemas. After a separately authorized live run, create proposal-only export records and evaluate whether the line-range-first output contract produces source-linked claims, reviewable line-range locator candidates, honest exact/approximate/broad/missing labels, unsupported-claim handling, and metadata-safe locally computed offsets and quote hashes only after line-range validation. Method quality, trading validity, product readiness, strategy evidence, graduation, and architecture are not evaluated by this planning packet.
